name: OnTlsHandshakeComplete
title: OnTlsHandshakeComplete
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when a TLS handshake is completed.

parameters.name: socket
parameters.description: The TLS socket handle. If the handle is valid (not equal to ~0), it corresponds to the socket that was used for tlsOpen.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The specific result code of the operation. If the operation completed successfully the value is zero. Otherwise the value is an error code.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
